nodes.name: SIEM Webhook
nodes.notes: Receives SIEM offense payloads from siem_simulator.py

nodes.name: Validate Payload
nodes.notes: Validate required fields offense_id and severity

nodes.name: Extract Fields
nodes.notes: Extract and normalize offense fields for IRIS case creation

nodes.name: Create IRIS Case
nodes.notes: Create new case in DFIR-IRIS with SLA assignment based on severity

nodes.name: Store SLA Start
nodes.notes: Store IRIS case ID and SLA start timestamp, log to JSONL file

nodes.name: Respond OK
nodes.notes: Return 200 OK with case_id to SIEM simulator

nodes.name: Enrich Case
nodes.notes: Fire enrichment AFTER Respond OK (async). workflowId is a resource-locator; replace ENRICH_WF_ID with the imported sub-workflow id. Receives the Build Enrich Input item via passthrough.

nodes.name: Close Webhook
nodes.notes: Endpoint for analyst to close a case. Body: {"case_id": 42, "close_reason": "resolved"}

nodes.name: Close IRIS Case
nodes.notes: Close the IRIS case via API

nodes.name: Calculate SLA Duration
nodes.notes: Calculate SLA duration and log close event to JSONL

parameters.responseBody: ={"status": "closed", "case_id": "{{ $('Calculate SLA Duration').first().json.case_id }}", "sla_duration_seconds": "{{ $('Calculate SLA Duration').first().json.sla_duration_seconds }}", "sla_status": "{{ $('Calculate SLA Duration').first().json.sla_status }}", "sla_result": "{{ $('Calculate SLA Duration').first().json.status_md }}" }

nodes.name: Error Handler

parameters.responseBody: { "error": "IRIS API error", "message": "Failed to reach or process the request in DFIR-IRIS" }

nodes.notes: Returns 502 when an IRIS API call fails so the webhook caller is not left hanging

nodes.name: Validate Close Payload
nodes.notes: Validate required field case_id before calling IRIS

nodes.name: Reject Close Invalid
nodes.notes: Return 400 if close payload is missing case_id

nodes.name: Build Enrich Input
nodes.notes: Construct {case_id,indicator,indicator_type,source_ip} for the enrichment sub-workflow (trigger is passthrough)
